name: Floral Comb
description: Designed with a premium floral pattern, the 360 Floral Comb features wide-spaced teeth crafted to gently detangle thick, dense, and curly hair. Prevents hair breakage, distributes natural scalp oils evenly, and adds a luxury aesthetic to your vanity.
benefits: Gently detangles thick and curly hair

name: MAKEUP WEDGES
description: Premium cosmetic wedges designed for smooth, streak-free liquid and cream foundation application.

name: Light Pink Satin Scrunchie
description: Luxury light pink satin scrunchie designed to hold hair comfortably without causing pulling, snagging, or creasing.
benefits: Prevents hair breakage and pulling split ends

name: Rose Quartz Face Roller
description: Authentic rose quartz facial roller designed to reduce morning puffiness, stimulate lymphatic drainage, and assist product absorption.
benefits: Improves blood circulation and skin elasticity
